limit_usd.description: USD limit for the thread. 0 means no configured cap.

spent_usd.description: Observed spend accumulated from session cost reporters.

soft_pct.description: Percent of limit_usd where budget.warning should emit.

hard_pct.description: Percent of limit_usd where the scheduler pauses work.

max_concurrent_workers.description: Optional per-thread scheduler concurrency override. null/absent uses the global default.
